headline: Church & Dwight to Present at the dbAccess Global Consumer Conference
summary: EWING, N.J., May 26, 2026--Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE: CHD) announced today that President and Chief Executive Officer, Rick Dierker, Chief Financial Officer, Lee McChesney, and EVP International, Michael Read, will participate in the dbAccess Global Consumer Conference on Tuesday, June 2 at 6:00 a.m. EDT / 12:00 p.m. CEST. A link to the broadcast will be provided through the Investors section of the Church & Dwight’s website.

headline: PG vs. CHD: Which Consumer Staples Giant Has the Stronger Growth Edge?
summary: PG pairs broad category reach with innovation-led execution, while CHD is leaning on focused, value-driven brands and distribution expansion.
